transcript:
CALLER: Hi, umm, I had an appointment tomorrow morning and I need to cancel it. Something came up.
AGENT: I'm sorry to hear that. Could you please share your name and the appointment details?
CALLER: My name is Arvind Patil. The appointment was with Dr. Meena Shah, I think at 10 AM tomorrow.
AGENT: Let me pull that up... Yes, I can see the appointment for Mr. Arvind Patil with Dr. Meena Shah on Wednesday at 10 AM. Would you like to cancel it entirely or would you prefer to reschedule?
CALLER: Uh, cancel for now. I'll call back when I'm free.
AGENT: Understood. Your appointment has been cancelled. No cancellation fee applies since you're notifying us more than 12 hours in advance. Whenever you're ready to rebook, feel free to call us.
CALLER: Okay, thanks.
AGENT: You're welcome, Mr. Patil. Have a good day!
